tasks.subject: Task 0: Helper + tests (TDD)
tasks.description:
tools/local_hooks/lib/tasks_live_query.py + tests/hooks/test_tasks_live_query.py — 5 TDD tests covering live-store read, dotfile exclusion, transcript fallback, malformed-JSON skip, --no-live-store flag.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/local_hooks/lib/tasks_live_query.py", "tests/hooks/__init__.py", "tests/hooks/test_tasks_live_query.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/hooks/test_tasks_live_query.py -v --no-header", "acceptanceCriteria": ["helper --help exits 0", "5 tests pass", "ruff+mypy clean", "fail-open contract holds"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Refit all 5 marketplace hooks
tasks.description:
tools/local_hooks/{pre-commit-check-tasks,pre-task-blockedby-enforce,post-task-complete-revalidate,post-agent-return-validate,stop-revalidate-user-gates}.sh — 5 refit hooks that shell out to tasks_live_query.py.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/local_hooks/pre-commit-check-tasks.sh", "tools/local_hooks/pre-task-blockedby-enforce.sh", "tools/local_hooks/post-task-complete-revalidate.sh", "tools/local_hooks/post-agent-return-validate.sh", "tools/local_hooks/stop-revalidate-user-gates.sh"], "verifyCommand": "for f in tools/local_hooks/*.sh; do bash -n \"$f\" || exit 1; done", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 scripts with variant=local marker", "no inline python3 -c task parsing", "bash -n clean"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Install script + execute install
tasks.description:
tools/local_hooks/install.sh + README; runs install; backs up settings.json; swaps 5 hook paths.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/local_hooks/install.sh", "tools/local_hooks/README.md", "/home/claudeuser/.claude/settings.json"], "verifyCommand": "bash tools/local_hooks/install.sh --dry-run && bash tools/local_hooks/install.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dry-run no-op", "live install exits 0", "backup matches pre-install", "settings.json still valid"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Smoke-verify each hook fires the local variant
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE. Trigger each of 5 hooks; capture variant=local trace lines; confirm no variant=marketplace.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "tail -500 /tmp/claude-hooks/user-gate-trace.log | grep -c variant=local", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 variant=local lines (1/hook)", "same-turn commit unblocked", "0 variant=marketplace lines"], "modelTier": "standard", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["variant=local"], ["no-marketplace"]]}
```
